tools.name: Adobe Firefly
tools.description: Adobe AI for images – Generative Fill, text-to-image; integration with Photoshop, CC. "Legally safe" sources.

tools.name: AIVA
tools.description: Music composition with AI – for ads, games, films.

tools.name: Beatoven.ai
tools.description: Royalty-free music – emotion control, optimization for video background, YouTube monetization.

tools.name: Beautiful.ai
tools.description: No design skills needed – smart templates, auto-layout.

tools.name: Boomy
tools.description: Simple UI, many templates – lo-fi, background, social content; quick publishing.

tools.name: Canva
tools.description: All-in-one – Magic Write, templates, visuals; universal everyday tool.

tools.name: Canva AI
tools.description: Image generation integrated with design tool – templates, Magic Design.

tools.name: ChatGPT (OpenAI)
tools.description: Universal conversational AI – best for general writing, summaries and idea generation.

tools.name: Claude (Anthropic)
tools.description: Strong on long texts and document analysis, responsible response style.

tools.name: Connected Papers
tools.description: Academic paper relationship visualization – shows related work in a graph, helps find relevant sources quickly.

tools.name: Consensus
tools.description: Research search with AI – answers based on peer-reviewed articles, synthesis and citations.

tools.name: Copilot (Microsoft)
tools.description: In the Microsoft ecosystem – Outlook, Word, Teams; great for office work.

tools.name: DALL·E (OpenAI)
tools.description: Image generation via ChatGPT – text-to-image, style and proportions.

tools.name: DeepSeek
tools.description: Strong for coding, math and logic – great value for money.

tools.name: ElevenLabs (voices)
tools.description: Voice and sound effects generation – announcements, transitions, sound design.

tools.name: Elicit
tools.description: Research automation – literature reviews, data synthesis, RAG-style research.

tools.name: Figma
tools.description: Visual layout and design – context for AI generation (e.g. web HTML).

tools.name: Gamma
tools.description: Presentation generation – slides, proposals, brochures; interactive web format.

tools.name: Gemini (Google)
tools.description: Integrated with Google services – mail, docs, search in one place.

tools.name: Google Calendar
tools.description: Google Calendar – event planning; can be used in chains with Gemini.

tools.name: GPTZero
tools.description: Benchmark tool for academia – ~99% accuracy on text; detects mixed (human + AI) content.

tools.name: Grok (xAI)
tools.description: Real-time data from X (Twitter) – news, trends, public discussion.

tools.name: Ideogram
tools.description: Image generation with text in image – ads, posters, logos.

tools.name: InVideo
tools.description: Video creation with AI – templates, text-to-video, for social content.

tools.name: Isgen.ai (LT)
tools.description: Lithuanian AI detector, good at spotting text from popular LLMs (~96% accuracy).

tools.name: Leonardo.ai
tools.description: Image and visual generation – game art, Stable Diffusion-style models.

tools.name: Luma Dream Machine
tools.description: Video generation from text – realistic and creative clips.

tools.name: Make.com
tools.description: Visual workflow building (drag & drop), conditions and loops – for mid-size business, better free plan than Zapier.

tools.name: MyDetector.ai
tools.description: Quick free AI text detector, no sign-up, supports many languages.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.description: High-quality image generation – illustrations, art, conceptual images.

tools.name: Mubert
tools.description: Background and stock video music – licenses for commercial use.

tools.name: n8n
tools.description: Open-source workflow automation – full control, AI agent support, for technical teams and many API integrations.

tools.name: NotebookLM (Google)
tools.description: Google tool to upload documents and "talk" to them – personal RAG from your files, podcast generation.

tools.name: NoteLM
tools.description: Links notes and documents to a language model – personal RAG from your notes.

tools.name: Notion
tools.description: Universal workspace – notes, prompt library, docs, project management in one place.

tools.name: PaperGuide
tools.description: "Talk" to PDFs – academic PDFs, literature reviews, data extraction.

tools.name: Perplexity
tools.description: AI search with sources – academic queries, literature reviews, fact-checking.

tools.name: Pika
tools.description: Video creation from text or image – animations, short clips.

tools.name: Power Automate
tools.description: Microsoft ecosystem automation – Excel, Teams, Outlook, SharePoint; for admin, sales, project management.

tools.name: Prezent.ai
tools.description: For business – brand, Story Builder, narrative; corporate presentations.

tools.name: Runway
tools.description: Video generation from text – short clips, effects, editing.

tools.name: Scite
tools.description: Smart citations – how research is cited; source reliability assessment.

tools.name: SlidesAI
tools.description: Text → slides in a few clicks. Google Slides integration.

tools.name: Sora (OpenAI)
tools.description: Video generation from text – high quality, realistic motion physics, scene consistency.

tools.name: Soundraw
tools.description: Music generation and editing – melodies, tempo, mood.

tools.name: Stable Diffusion (DreamStudio)
tools.description: Open image generation model – flexible, many styles, control via negative prompt.

tools.name: Suno
tools.description: Music generation from description – songs, instrumental, various styles.

tools.name: Synthesia
tools.description: Avatar-based videos – presentations, training, intros.

tools.name: Trello
tools.description: Boards and cards – can describe tasks as context for RAG prompts.

tools.name: Udio
tools.description: Music creation from text – mood, style, tempo, vocal or instrumental.

tools.name: Veo 3 (Google)
tools.description: Google video generation model – create videos from text (prompt).

tools.name: Veo 3 (Google)
tools.description: Google video generation model – videos from text (prompt), high quality.

tools.name: Visme
tools.description: For reports and data – infographics, interactivity.

tools.name: Winston AI
tools.description: Highly accurate AI content detection, low false positive rate; widely used in schools and publishing.

tools.name: Workato
tools.description: Enterprise workflow and integration platform – governance, audits, compliance; for large organizations.

tools.name: Zapier
tools.description: Automates workflows between apps – in AI chains can send data to email, calendar, etc.

tools.name: ZeroGPT
tools.description: Free tool to quickly check AI content.
